title: Lane rotation blind spot
summary: Someone wants eyes on whether the customs spike is incompetence—or a shaped hole.

objectives.text: Walk the main dock customs line and watch how holds are routed.

objectives.prompt: You can file a straight report, sell a quiet tip to independents, or stay out of it.

choices.label: File a straight report with station clerks.
choices.outcome: Paperwork closes the loop; lanes tighten.

choices.label: Sell a quiet tip about the blind spot.
choices.outcome: Credits now; the hole stays open a little longer.

choices.label: Walk away—you did not see anything reliable.

title: Smoothing desk rumor
summary: A reconciliation miss has traders whispering. Audit wants a neutral pair of eyes before they go formal.

objectives.text: Listen to floor talk where listings and rumors concentrate.

objectives.prompt: You can back the boring explanation, nudge audit toward a specific desk, or decline to sign your name.

choices.label: Back the boring clerical explanation.
choices.outcome: The file stays small; volatility cools.

choices.label: Nudge audit toward the desk that benefits your contacts.
choices.outcome: Pressure lands where you pointed; favors trade hands.
